summary: Tested Istoric Dividende PRO feature for FinRomania 2.0. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed: 3 tabs visible, PRO paywall for non-logged users, rankings table with 43 stocks for PRO users, analysis panel with chart opens on stock click, score badges show correct color gradients.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/analysis/TLV — returns full analysis with dividend_score, yearly_dividends, metrics, payments
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/analysis/SNP — returns analysis with CAGR, consecutive_years
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/analysis/tlv — lowercase symbol converted to uppercase
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/rankings — returns cached rankings with 43 stocks sorted by dividend_score
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/rankings — entry structure has all required fields (symbol, company, dividend_score, rating, breakdown)
✅ GET /api/bvb-dividends/rankings — top stock has high score (AAG: 90)
✅ Score breakdown (stability + growth + yield) sums correctly to total score
✅ Rating matches score range (Excelent 80-100, Foarte Bun 65-79, Bun 50-64, Mediu 35-49, Slab 0-34)
✅ Frontend: /calculator-dividende shows 3 tabs: Calculator, Acțiuni cu Dividende, Istoric Dividende
✅ Frontend: Istoric Dividende tab shows Lock icon for non-PRO users
✅ Frontend: Istoric Dividende tab shows PRO paywall when not logged in
✅ Frontend: Istoric Dividende tab shows rankings table when logged in as PRO user (43 stocks)
✅ Frontend: Clicking a stock in rankings opens detailed analysis panel with bar chart
✅ Frontend: Score badge shows correct color gradient (green for Excelent, blue for Foarte Bun, red for Slab)
critical_code_review_comments: Dividend Score calculation is well-implemented with proper weighting: Stability (40%), Growth (30%), Yield (30%)
EODHD integration correctly fetches deep history (5+ years) with rate limiting (0.3s between calls)
Rankings cache in MongoDB prevents repeated EODHD calls, refreshes in background if >6 hours old
Analysis endpoint properly merges BVB.ro (higher priority) with EODHD data, deduplicating by date
Frontend DividendHistoryTab component correctly handles PRO/non-PRO state with paywall
ScoreBadge component uses correct color gradients matching rating labels
Recharts bar chart properly displays yearly dividend data with green highlight for most recent year
seed_data_creation: Rankings cache already computed and stored in MongoDB (43 stocks) from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Istoric Dividende PRO feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/bvb-dividends/analysis/{symbol} for per-stock analysis (calls EODHD, takes 1-2s), /api/bvb-dividends/rankings for cached rankings (43 stocks). Frontend tab 'Istoric Dividende' shows paywall for non-PRO, rankings table for PRO users. Analysis panel opens on stock click with bar chart. Score badges use color gradients: green (Excelent 80-100), blue (Foarte Bun 65-79), amber (Bun 50-64), orange (Mediu 35-49), red (Slab 0-34).
